title: Profitable Pest Control Business: Turnkey & Recession Proof
description:
This well-established pest control business has been serving the Dallas-Fort Worth area since 2008, specializing in termite, general pest, and rodent control for residential and commercial clients. The company operates efficient, tight routes with most customers within a 10-mile radius, providing consistent recurring revenue.

The business has a loyal customer base, including hundreds of every-other-month clients and over 100 quarterly clients, with an average customer tenure of over five years. Growth opportunities include further leveraging subscription models, expanding digital marketing, increasing service capacity within the existing service area, and expanding the service area.

This business is highly differentiated through a strong commitment to accountability, honest inspections, and personalized service. The industry is stable and recession resistant. Inventory and equipment are included in the sale, making this a true turnkey opportunity for a motivated buyer.

Seller Financing Available for a Well-Qualified Buyer.

Inquire for more details and learn how you can buy a business for as little as 10% down on qualified SBA listings or how to use creative financing options to get a deal done!
